Subject: The Supreme Court is expected to determine whether Trump can keep running for president. Here's why

Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

            <tr>
                <td id="Title12582858" width="560" align="left" style="padding: 20px 20px 8px 20px; font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size:28px; line-height:1.2;color:#333333;font-weight:normal;text-decoration:none;">

            <tr>

                </td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
                <td height="25" align="left">

<td id="Card12582862" class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); ">
                <td>
                    <a id="Href12582862" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAD54LLNV23CV3PZZ7FQQPBQS4YFI7Y3NXTJ3SFHYUKBPSLBMUJRPGN5XMITHJCYOIHTOBQTGDO6HZJJXZ7RKJKIGIRHJTOBWFMWYGJSAYIB3NJ74QFOESZYRERZ3GV5PDCBHOGPYJA4ZGXGBFQOGHGS2C7YC4AFLXMUXOUEY3EHK7FUAXSQUP&" target="_blank">

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td id="Title12582862" style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="Href12582862" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADKLNKYOHYK6LDN56DSXB3QI72HJZRY3GMWI25VR6NV2SZL4UECW3PDS34RNR7X5S6D2X774652IONGGG2K77NWIKZBC4QWJM5YVGON2CTXEZJ7UID6YDZKXNSG5LHOKEUSOJLXS4ISDXD7ZEBWZQC4XCFFFCTLPYCN772YGBFNJVY2Y3CLYL&" target="_blank">
                        Florida Surgeon General calls for halt to COVID-19 vaccine usage…
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <td id="ProviderName12582862" height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">

            </tr>

    </table>

</td>

                                </tr>
                            </table>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
<tr>
    <td height="12"></td>
</tr>

<tr width="600">
    <td>
        <hr style="border: .5px solid #D3D3D3;">

</tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
Was this email forwarded to you?  <a id="FooterSubscribeHere" style="text-decoration: underline ;color: #0066cc; cursor: pointer;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADHXTYPYJGXBR2AJWMI5FDOWXJ7N77MGDWGUBKVIROMUPQBG5NXIS7VK2S6XLKLDRJFOCOGJWOPIK2EKEHJRZQUKKI4ZHYKLX752EAGLYF3WLSGYBMDWXLI4OWPC6BIMXNRB2GMXT563BFHBTK5F7FKKJBZSBLEZAD5SKVYF5ILAKYNSODWJ5&d=AIAAD52GNOHIZP772DTIXTOJRBLWEHXYXSW4W72YVYDGSNW2Y4233N4ETARWQTOQOIKOSHCIDZ43R34FMEJ2ECV3NA2NKOK6RFY7EAOSYFHM5QXVMNZM77WOIJU275SIV5ZA7YP4YYOGFSX753TB65MKY2AESYTAOOTGWUHXHI4WTEMJURNPB3OW&" target="_blank">Subscribe here. </a>
        </div>
        <br>
    </td>
</tr>
